page_metadata.biotools__summary: MovieMaker is a web server that accepts PDB files or PDB accession numbers as input and allows short (~10 sec) downloadable movies to be generated of protein motions and interactions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MovieMaker is a web server that accepts PDB files or PDB accession numbers as input and allows short (~10 sec) downloadable movies to be generated of protein motions and interactions.
